popularStory.description: Katherine de la Pole, Countess of Suffolk (born around 1376 – 8 April 1419) was a daughter of Hugh de Stafford, 2nd Earl of Stafford, and his wife Lady Philippa de Beauchamp. By her marriage to Michae …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Stafford於大約1375年出生在英國斯塔福爾時，她的父親Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford41歲，母親Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP42歲。她於1391年11月23日與Michael de la Pole II在英國素福爾可科頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1419年4月8日在英國英格蘭素福爾可文費爾德享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Stafford于大约1375年出生在英国斯塔福爾时，她的父亲Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford41岁，母亲Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP42岁。她于1391年11月23日与Michael de la Pole II在英国素福爾可科頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1419年4月8日在英国英格兰素福爾可文費爾德享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Stafford was born about 1375, in Staffordshire, England, her father, Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford, was 41 and her mother, Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP, was 42. She married Michael de la Pole II on 23 November 1391, in Cotton, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 8 April 1419, in Wingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Stafford est née environ 1375, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Michael de la Pole II le 23 novembre 1391, à Cotton, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 avril 1419, à Wingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Stafford um 1375 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford 41 und ihre Mutter Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP 42. Sie hat am 23. November 1391 in Cotton, Suffolk, England Michael de la Pole II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. April 1419 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Wingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Stafford è nata il circa 1375 nel Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Michael de la Pole II il 23 novembre 1391, nel Cotton, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 8 aprile 1419, nel Wingfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Staffordが約1375年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Staffordは41歳，母Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMPは42歳であった。1391年11月23日にイギリススフォルクコットオンでMichael de la Pole IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1419年4月8日にイギリスイギリススフォルクウィングフィールドで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Stafford(이)가 대략 1375년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1391년 11월 23일 영국 수폴크 컷에서 Michael de la Pole II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1419년 4월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 윙필드에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Stafford nasceu aproximadamente 1375, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Michael de la Pole II em 23 de novembro de 1391, em Cotton, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de abril de 1419, em Wingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Stafford родилась около 1375 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Michael de la Pole II 23 ноября 1391 г. в местности коттон, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 8 апреля 1419 г. в местности вингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Stafford nació aproximadamente 1375, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Stafford 2nd Earl of Stafford, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Phiillipa de BEAUCHAMP, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Michael de la Pole II el 23 de noviembre de 1391, en Cotton, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 8 de abril de 1419, en Wingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años.
